notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Casey Schmitt, assist to third baseman Matt Chapman. Jackson Merrill scores.

notableEvents.label: Manny Machado reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Casey Schmitt, assist to third baseman Matt Chapman. Jackson Merrill scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Matt Chapman. Gavin Sheets scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Matt Chapman. Gavin Sheets scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Xander Bogaerts to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Merrill GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill grounds into a double play, catcher Daniel Susac to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Bryce Johnson out at home. Jackson Merrill out at 1st.
